label: 4231 to 4234 Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 89–44, title III, § 30179 Stat. 145June 21, 1965
notes: Section 4231, acts , ; , ; , –(c), , 1287; , , , imposed a tax on admissions, permanent use or lease of boxes or seats, sales outside of box office in excess of established price, sales by proprietors in excess of established price, and cabarets.Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 497Aug. 6, 1956, ch. 1019, § 170 Stat. 1074Pub. Section 4232, acts , ; , , , defined admission, roof garden, cabaret, or other similar place, and performance for profit as used in section 4231.Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 498Pub. L. 85–859, title I, § 131(d)72 Stat. 1287Sept. 2, 1958

Section 4233, acts , ; , ; , , §§ 1–3, ; , , (f), ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , granted certain exemptions to certain charitable, educational, or religious entertainments, agricultural fairs, certain musical or dramatic performances, swimming pools, etc., home and garden tours, historic sites, certain amateur theatricals, certain amateur baseball games, rodeos, pageants, and certain benefit performances.Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 498Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 792, § 169 Stat. 675Pub. Section 4234, , , required that price of tickets be printed on face or back of such tickets and provided a penalty for selling tickets not so stamped.act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 501
